description:
You are a customer service representative logging a call you just completed. Create a call log entry in SuiteCRM with the following details:

- Subject: Billing Discrepancy Follow-up - Invoice #4821
- Status: Held
- Direction: Inbound
- Duration: 0 hours, 15 minutes
- Description: Customer called regarding a $340 overcharge on Invoice #4821 dated January 3, 2025. Agreed to issue a credit memo within 48 hours. Customer satisfied with resolution plan.

Relate this call to the contact Rachel Morrison or the account Pinnacle Distribution Co.
